-p, --package-id    Required. Package Id to check for updates
-f, --folder        Required. Folder containing projects
-c, --cache         cache file
-s, --source        Urls to additional NuGet feeds to load
-x, --exclude       Package Ids to exclude from the update
--help              Display this help screen.
--version           Display version information.
